summary: Critical issues prevent shipping: (1) Fixture files (fixtures/healthy-secrets.json, fixtures/mixed-secrets.json) referenced throughout workflow and tests are not provided—deliverable is incomplete and workflow will fail immediately. (2) Security violation: actions/checkout@v4 is not pinned to commit SHA; should be pinned with version comment per best practices. (3) Script quality is reasonable (good Pester tests, clear PowerShell idioms, proper error handling with exit codes), but Set-StrictMode missing from main module scripts. (4) Test harness (test-harness.ps1) is verbose and doesn't verify actual end-to-end execution; validation is loose pattern-matching rather than strict assertions. Refactor needed: create fixture JSON files, pin action, add Set-StrictMode to all scripts, tighten test harness validation.
